textPlain: I suspect that this unaligned read apporach doesn't work for a bit length of 59, 61, 62 and 63.In the case of 63, reading out value at offset 1, requires two reads as it need 1 bit from the first byte, then 56 bits from the next 7 bytes and finally 6 bits from the 9th byte. Nine bytes cannot be loaded in a single u64 load.
